_meta.title: Budget I2V Model Comparison Pipeline
_meta.description: 并行对比五种低成本I2V模型：Wan2.6Flash / Vidu Q3 Turbo / Hailuo 2.3 Std / Seedance Fast / Veo3.1 Fast
_meta.author: PostGrad#11 Session
_meta.notes: This workflow demonstrates how to compare multiple budget video models from a single keyframe

_meta.title: Wan 2.6 Flash I2V
_meta.notes: Fastest model. Has audio. Cheapest per-second. Good for rapid iteration.

inputs.prompt: The samurai lobster draws katana, bamboo leaves swirl in moonlight

_meta.title: Vidu Q3 Turbo I2V
_meta.notes: Good quality-to-cost. Has audio. Moderate speed. Higher bitrate than Wan Flash.

inputs.prompt: The samurai lobster draws katana, bamboo leaves swirl in moonlight

_meta.title: Hailuo 2.3 Standard I2V
_meta.notes: Highest resolution of budget tier. No audio. Slowest. Slightly higher cost.

inputs.prompt: The samurai lobster draws katana, bamboo leaves swirl in moonlight

_meta.title: Seedance v1.5 Pro Fast I2V
_meta.notes: Most expensive budget tier. Has audio. Highest file size. Slowest of the group.

inputs.prompt: The samurai lobster draws katana, bamboo leaves swirl in moonlight

_meta.title: Veo 3.1 Fast I2V (rhart-video-v3.1-fast)
_meta.notes: EXTREME value: 8 seconds for only ¥0.04! Has audio. Best cost-per-second by far.

inputs.prompt: The samurai lobster draws katana, bamboo leaves swirl in moonlight

rankings.recommendation: For budget production: Veo 3.1 Fast (best cost-per-second, 8s output, has audio). For rapid iteration: Wan 2.6 Flash (fastest, 25s generation). For resolution priority: Hailuo 2.3 Std (1376x768).
